    M

    Mage - Enum constant in enum class NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties.UnitClass
    A magic-wielding class specializing in powerful spells and area-of-effect damage.
    MagicCard - Class in NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.MagicCard
    An abstract base class representing a Magic Card in the game.
    MagicCard(String, String, String) - Constructor for class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.MagicCard.MagicCard
    Constructs a new MagicCard with the specified details.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class gui.GameUI
    The main method that launches the JavaFX application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class gui.Launcher
    The main entry point of the application.
    Maskman - Enum constant in enum class NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties.UnitClass
    A ranged physical damage dealer class.
    MenuArea - Class in gui.board
    Represents the right-side menu area of the game board.
    MenuArea() - Constructor for class gui.board.MenuArea
    Constructs the main action menu for the game.
    ModifierCard - Class in NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.ModifierCard
    Represents a Modifier Card in the game.
    ModifierCard() - Constructor for class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.ModifierCard.ModifierCard
    Default constructor for ModifierCard.
    ModifierCard(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.ModifierCard.ModifierCard
    Parameterized constructor to create a specific ModifierCard.
    ModifierUtils - Class in NonGui.GameUtils
    Utility class for handling Modifier card interactions during a roll phase.
    ModifierUtils() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameUtils.ModifierUtils
     
    ModifierView - Class in gui
    Handles the visual interface for the Modifier Phase.
    ModifierView() - Constructor for class gui.ModifierView
